args:
set -eu
rg -n 'START_DP_WAVE|transport|frame|route|client' \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/client.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/client/imp.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/tests/client.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/transport.rs \
  vllm/rust/src/server/src/routes/tests.rs \
  vllm/tests/v1/engine/test_engine_core_client.py >/dev/null
trace_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trace_path="$trace_dir/rust-transport.trace.fozzy"
fozzy run tests/trace.build_prefill_scope.fozzy.json --det --record "$trace_path" --json >/dev/null
fozzy shrink "$trace_path" --json | jq -e '.outTrace and .summary.mode == "run"' >/dev/null
printf 'shrink-vllm-rust-transport\n'
